resultList.dtldesc: Situated in one of the most well-placed locations of Ahmedabad, this newly constructed 3 BHK flat for sale in Naranpura provides a cozy and comfortable home for families seeking to settle down in a serene yet convenient neighborhood.Property SpecificationsThis 6th-floor flat has a generous carpet area of 1170 sqft and complemented by mosaic flooring in all rooms.
